text_original: is alright but it would be good if they put , like a chat persona , so you can actually create your own character without typing in the long box.
text_zh: 还行，但如果他们能加入类似聊天角色的设定，这样你就可以真正创建自己的角色，而不需要在长长的文本框里输入。
reply_original: Hi there! We appreciate your feedback on the character creation process. To better understand your needs, could you share more details about the "chat persona" feature you'd like to see? Your input will help us improve the experience. For further assistance, please reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Thank you!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您对角色创建过程的反馈。为了更好地了解您的需求，能否分享一下您希望看到的“chat persona”功能的更多细节？您的意见将帮助我们改进体验。如需进一步帮助，请联系 support@fantachat.ai。感谢！
